
```{python}

import os
import re

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import ExpMethods.utils as util
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as patches

from glob import glob
from linecache import getline
from itertools import product
from scipy.stats import wilcoxon, bootstrap
from ExpMethods.globals import GlobalValues

```


# Post Processing

## find corrupted IDs for Weinstock

```{python}

all_files = glob("../weinstock/**/*_forecasts.csv", recursive = True)

corrupted_paths = [file for file in all_files if re.search(r"^[0\.,]+$", getline(file, 23))]

corrupted_files = [re.findall("../(.*)/h-(.{1,4})hr/context-(.{1,4})hr/.*/(\d{3})", file)[0] for file in corrupted_paths]

comparison_cols = ["dataset","horizon","context","id"]

corrupted_df = pd.DataFrame(corrupted_files, columns = comparison_cols)

corrupted_df

```



# RMSE Analysis

```{python}

def is_outlier(x):
    q1, q3 = x.quantile(0.25), x.quantile(0.75)
    
    iqr = q3 - q1
    
    lower = q1 - 1.5*iqr
    upper = q3 + 1.5*iqr

    return np.logical_or(x > upper, x < lower).values


#idx_outlier(min_rmse.rmse)

```


```{python}

rmse = pd.read_csv("../full_rmse.csv")

rmse = rmse.dropna(axis=0)

rmse.id = rmse.id.astype(str).str.pad(width=3,side="left",fillchar="0")

# merged = pd.merge(rmse, corrupted_df, how = "outer", on = comparison_cols, indicator = True)
# 
# rmse = merged[merged["_merge"] == "left_only"].drop("_merge",axis=1)

```


```{python}

min_idx = rmse.groupby(["dataset","horizon","context","model","id"])["rmse"].idxmin()

min_rmse = rmse.loc[min_idx].drop(["eta"],axis=1)
    
na_idx = min_rmse.loc[min_rmse.rmse.isna(),"id"]
    
min_rmse = min_rmse.loc[np.logical_not(min_rmse.id.isin(na_idx))]

min_rmse = min_rmse.loc[np.logical_not(min_rmse.model.isin(["HBML (c)","HBML (d)"])),:]
min_rmse.loc[min_rmse.model == "HBML (fd)","model"] = "HBML"
min_rmse.loc[min_rmse.horizon == "half","horizon"] = "0.5"

# min_rmse["outlier"] = min_rmse.drop("id",axis=1).groupby(["dataset","horizon","context","model"]).transform(lambda group: is_outlier(group))
# 
cleaned_rmse = min_rmse

#p.logical_and(min_rmse.horizon == "5", min_rmse.rmse > 350)

#min_rmse.loc[(min_rmse.dataset == "cgmacros") & (min_rmse.horizon == "2") & (rmse.context == "6"),"rmse"].describe()

# rmse.loc[(rmse.index.isin(min_idx)) & (rmse.dataset == "cgmacros") & (rmse.horizon == "half") & (rmse.model == "HBML (fd)"),["eta"]]

```


```{python}

# combinations = list(product(*[min_rmse[col].unique() for col in ["dataset","horizon","context"]]))
# 
# c_map = GlobalValues.color_params
# 
# for d,h,c in combinations:
#     
#     group = min_rmse.loc[(min_rmse.dataset == d) & (min_rmse.horizon == h) & (min_rmse.context == c)]
#     
#     plt.close("all")
#     #fix,ax = plt.subplots()
#     group.groupby("model").boxplot(subplots = False, column="rmse")
#     plt.title(f"dataset {d} horizon {h} context {c}")
#     #plt.legend(labels = list(c_map.keys), labelcolor = list(c_map.values))
#     plt.show()

```



```{python}

cleaned_rmse = cleaned_rmse.groupby(["dataset","horizon","context","model"]).rmse.apply(lambda x: pd.Series({"mean": np.round(x.mean(),2), "sd": np.round(x.std(),2)}, index = ["mean","sd"]))

cleaned_rmse = cleaned_rmse.reset_index().pivot(index = ["dataset","horizon","context","model"], columns = ["level_4"], values = "rmse").reset_index()

model_order = dict(ARIMA=0,ETS=1,NHITS=2,NODE=3,XGBoost=4,HBML=5)
horizon_order = {"0.5":0,"2":1,"5":2}
dataset_order = {"cgmacros":0,"weinstock":1}

cleaned_pivot = cleaned_rmse.pivot(index = ["horizon","model","dataset"],columns=["context"],values=["mean","sd"])

cleaned_pivot = cleaned_pivot.sort_values(by = ["dataset","horizon","model"], key = lambda x: x.map(dataset_order | horizon_order | model_order)).reset_index()

cleaned_pivot['h_freq'] = cleaned_pivot.groupby('horizon')['horizon'].transform('count')

cleaned_pivot["htab"] = np.where(cleaned_pivot.horizon.shift() == cleaned_pivot.horizon, "", "\multirow[t]{"+cleaned_pivot['h_freq'].astype(str)+"}{*}{"+cleaned_pivot['horizon'].astype(str)+"}")


cleaned_pivot.columns = cleaned_pivot.columns.map(lambda x: x[0] if not ({"mean","sd"} & set(x) ) else ".".join(x))

cleaned_pivot["endings"] = np.where(
    np.logical_and(
        cleaned_pivot["htab"].shift(-1) != "",
        cleaned_pivot.dataset.shift(-1) == cleaned_pivot.dataset
        ), "\\\\\cmidrule{1-6}","\\\\")

 cleaned_pivot.loc[cleaned_pivot.shape[0]-1,"endings"] = "\\\\"

cleaned_pivot.to_csv("../overleaf/tables/rmse_pivot.csv",index=False)

#min_pivot

```

# Clarke Error Grid Analysis


```{python}

ceg = pd.read_csv("../full_ceg.csv")

ceg.id = ceg.id.astype(str).str.pad(width=3,side="left",fillchar="0")

# merged = pd.merge(ceg, corrupted_df, how = "outer", on = comparison_cols, indicator = True)
# 
# ceg = merged[merged["_merge"] == "left_only"].drop("_merge",axis=1)

```


```{python}

ceg.loc[ceg.horizon == "half","horizon"] = "0.5"

# merged = pd.merge(ceg, min_rmse[min_rmse.outlier], on = ["dataset","horizon","context","id"], how = "left", indicator = True)
# 
# ceg = merged[merged["_merge"] == "left_only"].drop(["_merge"] + [col for col in merged.columns if merged[col].isna().any()],axis=1)

ceg["A+B"] = ceg.A + ceg.B
ceg["C+D"] = ceg.C + ceg.D
ceg["total"] = ceg.A + ceg.B + ceg.C + ceg.D + ceg.E

# ceg.head()

setting_cols = ["dataset","horizon","context"]
div_cols = ["A","B","C","D","E","A+B","C+D"]
pct_cols = [col + "pct" for col in div_cols]

ceg.loc[:,pct_cols] = 100*ceg.loc[:,div_cols].div(ceg.total,axis=0).values

```


```{python}

ceg = ceg.loc[ceg["A+Bpct"] > 50]

max_ceg = ceg.loc[ceg.groupby(setting_cols + ["id"]).A.idxmax()].drop(["eta","id"],axis=1).groupby(setting_cols).mean().reset_index()

#max_ceg["dataset"] = "weinstock"
max_ceg.loc[:,pct_cols + setting_cols] = np.round(max_ceg.loc[:,pct_cols + setting_cols],2)

#max_ceg.to_csv("../weinstock/max_ceg.csv", index = False)

```


## Table CSV Files

```{python}

#max_ceg.loc[max_ceg.horizon == "half","horizon"] = "0.5"

context_order = {"6":0,"12":1,"24":2,"full":3}


max_ceg = max_ceg.sort_values(by=setting_cols, key = lambda x: x.map(dataset_order | horizon_order | context_order)).drop(div_cols + ["total"], axis=1)

```


```{python}

max_ceg["d_freq"] = max_ceg.groupby('dataset')['dataset'].transform('count')
max_ceg["h_freq"] = max_ceg.groupby('horizon')['horizon'].transform('count')

max_ceg["dataset"] = max_ceg["dataset"].map(dict(weinstock="Weinstock 2016", cgmacros = "CGMacros"))

max_ceg["htab"] = np.where(max_ceg.horizon.shift() == max_ceg.horizon, "", "\multirow[t]{"+max_ceg['h_freq'].astype(str)+"}{*}{"+max_ceg['horizon'].astype(str)+"}")

max_ceg["dtab"] = np.where(max_ceg.dataset.shift() == max_ceg.dataset, "", "\multirow[t]{"+max_ceg['d_freq'].astype(str)+"}{*}{"+max_ceg['dataset'].astype(str)+"}")

max_ceg["endings"] = np.where(
    np.logical_and(
        max_ceg["htab"].shift(-1) != "",
        max_ceg.dataset.shift(-1) == max_ceg.dataset
        ), "\\\\\cmidrule{2-8}","\\\\")
        
max_ceg["endings"] = np.where(
    np.logical_and(
        max_ceg.dataset.shift(-1) != max_ceg.dataset,
        max_ceg.dataset.shift(-1) != None
),
"\\\\\cmidrule{1-8}",max_ceg["endings"]
)

max_ceg.to_csv("../overleaf/tables/max_ceg.csv", index = False)

```


# Adaptive Regret


```{python}

combinations = list(product(rmse.dataset.unique(), rmse.horizon.unique(), rmse.context.unique(), rmse.eta.astype(int).astype(str).unique()))

omit_models = ["Autoformer"]

for d,h,c,e in combinations:
    
    # print(f"../{d}/h-{h}hr/context-{c}hr/regrets/*_regrets_eta{e}.csv")
    # print(glob(f"../{d}/h-{h}hr/context-{c}hr/regrets/*_regrets_eta{e}.csv"))
    
    files = list(set(glob(f"../{d}/h-{h}hr/context-{c}hr/regrets/*_fullregrets_eta{e}.csv")))
    
    if not files:
        continue
    
    n_files = len(files)
    shapes = [pd.read_csv(path).shape for path in files]
    max_len = max([shape[0] for shape in shapes])
    max_col = max([shape[1] for shape in shapes])
    
    padded_arrays = []
    
    for path in files:
        df = pd.read_csv(path)
        cols_to_drop = list(set(df.columns) & set(omit_models))
        df.drop(cols_to_drop,axis=1,inplace=True)
        arr, cols = df.to_numpy(), df.columns
        
        #print(id_num)
        
        padded_arrays.append(
            np.pad(
                arr, 
                (
                    (0,max_len - len(arr)), 
                    (0, max_col - arr.shape[1])
                    ),
                    mode = "constant",
                    constant_values = np.nan)
                    )
                    
    stacked_arr = np.stack(padded_arrays)
    
    
    avg_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanmean(stacked_arr, axis = 0), columns = cols)
    q5_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanquantile(stacked_arr, axis = 0, q = 0.05), columns = cols)
    q95_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanquantile(stacked_arr, axis = 0, q = 0.95), columns = cols)
    
    c_vals = {col: GlobalValues.color_params[col] if not col.startswith("HBML") else GlobalValues.color_params["HBML"] for col in avg_regrets}
    ls_vals = {col: GlobalValues.linestyle_params[col] if col.startswith("HBML") else "-" for col in avg_regrets}
    
    extent = (100, max_len - 100, 0, np.max(avg_regrets))
    
    xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax = extent
    
    xmin_z, xmax_z = 0.8 * xmax, xmax
    
    ymin_z, ymax_z = .8 * avg_regrets.loc[xmin_z:xmax_z, "HBML (fd)"].min(), 1.2 * avg_regrets.loc[xmin_z:xmax_z, "HBML (fd)"].max()
    
    plt.close("all")
    fig,ax = plt.subplots(figsize = (12,8))
    axins = ax.inset_axes(
        [0.025, .5, .4, .45],
        xlim = (xmin_z, xmax_z), ylim = (ymin_z, ymax_z),
        xticks = [], yticks = [],
        )
    for col in avg_regrets.columns:
        if col in ["HBML (c)", "HBML (d)"]:
            continue
        
        label = "HBML" if col.startswith("HBML") else col
        ax.plot(avg_regrets.loc[xmin:xmax,col],
        c=c_vals[col],ls=ls_vals[col], 
        alpha = 1 - 0.3*(not col.startswith("HBML")),
        label = label,
        rasterized = True)
        
        axins.plot(avg_regrets.loc[xmin:xmax,col],
        c=c_vals[col],ls=ls_vals[col], 
        alpha = 1 - 0.3*(not col.startswith("HBML")),
        label = label,
        rasterized = True)
        
    ax.indicate_inset_zoom(axins, edgecolor="black")
    ax.legend(loc='upper left', bbox_to_anchor=(1, 1), fontsize = "small")
    ax.set_title(f"{d}: {h}-hour Horizon", fontsize = 24)
    ax.set_xlim((xmin,xmax))
    ax.set_ylim((ymin,ymax))
    ax.set_xlabel("Time Elapsed (min)", fontsize = 20)
    ax.set_ylabel("Regret Over Time ([mg/dL]/min)", fontsize = 20)
    plt.savefig(f"../images/zoom_{d}_h{h}_c{c}_eta{e}.pdf",dpi=400, bbox_inches = "tight")

    
#avg_regrets

```

```{python}

combinations = list(product(rmse.dataset.unique(), rmse.horizon.unique(), rmse.context.unique(), rmse.eta.astype(int).astype(str).unique()))

omit_models = ["Autoformer"]

for d,h,c,e in combinations:
    
    files = list(set(glob(f"../{d}/h-{h}hr/context-{c}hr/regrets/*_fullregrets_eta{e}.csv")) - set(corrupted_paths))
    
    if not files:
        continue
    
    n_files = len(files)
    shapes = [pd.read_csv(path).shape for path in files]
    max_len = max([shape[0] for shape in shapes])
    max_col = max([shape[1] for shape in shapes])
    
    padded_arrays = []
    
    for path in files:
        df = pd.read_csv(path)
        cols_to_drop = list(set(df.columns) & set(omit_models))
        df.drop(cols_to_drop,axis=1,inplace=True)
        arr, cols = df.to_numpy(), df.columns
        
        #print(id_num)
        
        padded_arrays.append(
            np.pad(
                arr, 
                (
                    (0,max_len - len(arr)), 
                    (0, max_col - arr.shape[1])
                    ),
                    mode = "constant",
                    constant_values = np.nan)
                    )
                    
    stacked_arr = np.stack(padded_arrays)
    
    
    avg_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanmean(stacked_arr, axis = 0), columns = cols)
    q5_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanquantile(stacked_arr, axis = 0, q = 0.05), columns = cols)
    q95_regrets = pd.DataFrame(np.nanquantile(stacked_arr, axis = 0, q = 0.95), columns = cols)
    
    c_vals = {col: GlobalValues.color_params[col] if not col.startswith("HBML") else GlobalValues.color_params["HBML"] for col in avg_regrets}
    ls_vals = {col: GlobalValues.linestyle_params[col] if col.startswith("HBML") else "-" for col in avg_regrets}
    
    extent = (100, max_len - 100, 0, np.max(avg_regrets))
    
    xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax = extent
    
    xmin_z, xmax_z = 0.8 * xmax, xmax
    
    ymin_z, ymax_z = .8 * avg_regrets.loc[xmin_z:xmax_z, "HBML (fd)"].min(), 1.2 * avg_regrets.loc[xmin_z:xmax_z, "HBML (fd)"].max()
    
    plt.close("all")
    fig,ax = plt.subplots(figsize = (12,8))
    # axins = ax.inset_axes(
    #     [0.025, .5, .4, .45],
    #     xlim = (xmin_z, xmax_z), ylim = (ymin_z, ymax_z),
    #     xticks = [], yticks = [],
    #     )
    for col in avg_regrets.columns:
        if col in ["HBML (c)", "HBML (d)"]:
            continue
        
        label = "HBML" if col.startswith("HBML") else col
        ax.plot(avg_regrets[col],
        c=c_vals[col],ls=ls_vals[col], 
        alpha = 1 - 0.3*(not col.startswith("HBML")),
        label = label,
        rasterized = True)
        
        # axins.plot(avg_regrets[col],
        # c=c_vals[col],ls=ls_vals[col], 
        # alpha = 1 - 0.3*(not col.startswith("HBML")),
        # label = label,
        # rasterized = True)
        
    #ax.indicate_inset_zoom(axins, edgecolor="black")
    ax.legend(loc='upper left', bbox_to_anchor=(1, 1), fontsize = "small")
    ax.set_title(f"{d.capitalize()} ({h}-hour Horizon)", fontsize = 24)
    ax.set_xlim((xmin,xmax))
    ax.set_ylim((ymin,ymax))
    ax.set_xlabel("Time Elapsed (min)", fontsize = 20)
    ax.set_ylabel("Regret Over Time ([mg/dL]/min)", fontsize = 20)
    plt.savefig(f"../images/{d}_h{h}_c{c}_eta{e}.pdf",dpi=400, bbox_inches = "tight")
    
#avg_regrets

```

# Weight Plot

```{python}

import ExpMethods.simulate as sim 
import ExpMethods.utils as utils
import ExpMethods.visualizations as viz

```

```{python}

targets = utils.load_results_from_csv("../weinstock/data/110.csv")
forecasts = utils.load_results_from_csv("../weinstock/h-5hr/context-fullhr/forecasts/110_forecasts.csv")
losses = utils.load_results_from_csv("../weinstock/h-5hr/context-fullhr/losses/110_losses.csv")
settings = utils.load_sim_settings("../weinstock/h-5hr/context-fullhr/settings/110.json")

```


```{python}

_,_, W = sim.weighted_forecast(
    forecasts, 
    losses, 
    mix_func = MixingMethods.FS_start_mix,
    alpha_func = AlphaMethods.fastdecreasing_alpha,
    save_weights = True,
    **settings)

```

```{python}

viz.plot_weights(W, names = forecasts.keys(), show = True, save = True, path = "../overleaf/images/methods/expert_weights_plot.pdf")

```


```{python}

preds = pd.read_csv("../weinstock/h-halfhr/context-6hr/forecasts/103_fullforecasts_eta100.csv")["HBML (fd)"]
ref = pd.read_csv("../weinstock/data/103.csv")["Libre.GL"]

viz.clarke_error_grid(ref,preds,show=True)

```


# CGMacros Diabetic Status Analysis

```{python}

# Load Diabetic Mappings
diab_order = {"T2D":0, "pre-T2D":1, "non-T2D":2}

diabetic_map = {}
for status, key in [("T2D", "diabetic_ids"), ("pre-T2D", "prediabetic_ids"), ("non-T2D", "nondiabetic_ids")]:
    for pat_id in GlobalValues.CGMacros.get(key, []):
        diabetic_map[pat_id] = status

def get_diabetic_status(patient_id):
    return diabetic_map.get(str(patient_id).zfill(3), "Unknown")

```

```{python}

# RMSE Analysis by Diabetic Status
cgmacros_rmse = min_rmse[min_rmse.dataset == "cgmacros"].copy()
cgmacros_rmse.loc[:, "diabetic_status"] = cgmacros_rmse["id"].apply(get_diabetic_status)

diab_rmse = cgmacros_rmse.groupby(["diabetic_status", "horizon", "context", "model"]).rmse.apply(lambda x: pd.Series({"mean": np.round(x.mean(),2), "sd": np.round(x.std(),2)}, index = ["mean","sd"]))
diab_rmse = diab_rmse.reset_index().pivot(index = ["diabetic_status", "horizon", "context", "model"], columns = ["level_4"], values = "rmse").reset_index()

diab_pivot = diab_rmse.pivot(index = ["horizon", "model", "diabetic_status"], columns=["context"], values=["mean","sd"])
diab_pivot = diab_pivot.sort_values(by = ["diabetic_status", "horizon", "model"], key = lambda x: x.map(diab_order | horizon_order | model_order)).reset_index()

diab_pivot['h_freq'] = diab_pivot.groupby('horizon')['horizon'].transform('count')
diab_pivot["htab"] = np.where(diab_pivot.horizon.shift() == diab_pivot.horizon, "", "\\multirow[t]{"+diab_pivot['h_freq'].astype(str)+"}{*}{"+diab_pivot['horizon'].astype(str)+"}")

diab_pivot.columns = diab_pivot.columns.map(lambda x: x[0] if not ({"mean","sd"} & set(x) ) else ".".join(x))

diab_pivot["endings"] = np.where(
    np.logical_and(
        diab_pivot["htab"].shift(-1) != "",
        diab_pivot.diabetic_status.shift(-1) == diab_pivot.diabetic_status
        ), "\\\\\\cmidrule{1-6}","\\\\\\")

diab_pivot.loc[diab_pivot.shape[0]-1,"endings"] = "\\\\\\"

diab_pivot.to_csv("../overleaf/tables/rmse_cgmacros_diabetic.csv", index=False)

```


```{python}

# Clarke Error Grid Analysis by Diabetic Status
cgmacros_ceg = ceg[ceg.dataset == "cgmacros"].copy()
cgmacros_ceg.loc[:, "diabetic_status"] = cgmacros_ceg["id"].apply(get_diabetic_status)

diab_max_ceg = cgmacros_ceg.loc[cgmacros_ceg.groupby(["diabetic_status", "horizon", "context", "id"]).A.idxmax()].drop(["eta", "id", "dataset"], axis=1, errors='ignore').groupby(["diabetic_status", "horizon", "context"]).mean(numeric_only=True).reset_index()

diab_max_ceg.loc[:, pct_cols + ["horizon", "context"]] = np.round(diab_max_ceg.loc[:, pct_cols + ["horizon", "context"]], 2)

diab_max_ceg = diab_max_ceg.sort_values(by=["diabetic_status", "horizon", "context"], key = lambda x: x.map(diab_order | horizon_order | context_order)).drop(div_cols + ["total"], axis=1, errors='ignore')

# Splitting CEG Diabetic Table
for status in ["T2D", "pre-T2D", "non-T2D"]:
    subset = diab_max_ceg[diab_max_ceg["diabetic_status"] == status].copy()
    if not subset.empty:
        subset["h_freq"] = subset.groupby('horizon')['horizon'].transform('count')
        subset["htab"] = np.where(subset.horizon.shift() == subset.horizon, "", "\\multirow[t]{"+subset['h_freq'].astype(str)+"}{*}{"+subset['horizon'].astype(str)+"}")
        
        subset["endings"] = np.where(
            subset["htab"].shift(-1) != "",
            "\\\\\\cmidrule{2-8}", "\\\\\\"
        )
        
        filename = f"../overleaf/tables/ceg_cgmacros_{status}.csv"
        subset.to_csv(filename, index=False)

```
